overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Monster Hunter game showing a hunter traversing a stormy desert wasteland. The character runs through sandy terrain accompanied by a small companion creature while lightning strikes illuminate the dark, turbulent sky and rocky spires dot the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon passage with steep walls

events.description: first lightning flashes become visible in the sky ahead

agents.ego_description: running steadily through a sandy canyon with a large weapon on back, heading toward an opening

notable_agents.action: small companion creature running alongside the player

entered.detail: tall jagged rock formation rising from the desert floor directly ahead
steep rocky cliff face forming the left boundary of the canyon
steep rocky cliff face forming the right boundary of the canyon
sandy desert floor with visible ripples and texture

segments.scene_description: The hunter runs through a narrow sandy canyon flanked by steep rock walls, approaching a prominent rock spire in the distance. A small companion creature runs alongside on the left as lightning first becomes visible in the stormy sky ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert dunes under active thunderstorm

events.description: intense lightning strike illuminates the sky as the storm intensifies
character begins ascending a steep sand dune slope

agents.ego_description: running up steep sandy slopes while navigating the open desert terrain

notable_agents.action: companion creature following behind and to the right

entered.detail: steep incline of loose sand requiring upward traversal
dark turbulent clouds with visible lightning activity
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Exiting the canyon into open desert, the hunter ascends steep sand dunes while lightning strikes frequently illuminate the stormy sky. The companion falls back to the right as the terrain opens up to reveal distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: storm-swept desert ridge with electrical activity

events.description: multiple lightning strikes hit simultaneously creating bright flashes
character adjusts direction slightly while running along the dune ridge

agents.ego_description: traversing the open ridge line while observing the intense lightning storm

notable_agents.action: companion running parallel on the right side

entered.detail: sharp rocky outcropping rising from the sand on the right
swirling storm clouds with concentrated lightning activity

segments.scene_description: Running along an open ridge, the hunter is surrounded by an intense electrical storm with multiple lightning strikes illuminating the area. The companion keeps pace on the right as they navigate past jagged rock formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert valley approach with distant oasis vegetation

events.description: distant palm trees become visible marking the edge of an oasis
terrain shows first signs of vegetation with scattered palm silhouettes

agents.ego_description: descending toward a valley while approaching an area with vegetation

notable_agents.action: companion running ahead on the left side

entered.detail: dark silhouettes of palm trees indicating oasis edge
lower elevation sandy terrain leading downward

segments.scene_description: The hunter descends toward a valley where silhouetted palm trees mark the approach to an oasis. The companion moves ahead on the left as the storm continues to rage overhead with frequent lightning strikes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic sandy canyon that gradually opens into a vast, storm-lashed desert wasteland. It begins with the hunter and a small companion sprinting through a narrow passage flanked by steep rock walls, heading toward a prominent distant spire as the first flashes of lightning appear in the dark sky. As the camera exits the canyon, the terrain expands into an open desert where the hunter ascends steep sand dunes under a sky illuminated by frequent lightning strikes. The scene then shifts as the companion falls back to the right, revealing a wide horizon of distant mountains beneath the turbulent storm.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a violent electrical storm that shifts from an exposed rocky ridge down into a sheltered desert valley. It begins with the hunter and their companion sprinting along an open ridge, where frequent lightning strikes illuminate the jagged rock formations against a dark sky. As the camera follows their descent, the terrain slopes downward and the open wasteland begins to give way to the silhouettes of palm trees. The scene then opens into a valley oasis, with the companion moving ahead on the left while the storm continues to rage overhead.
